gap_bootstrap_policy.limitation: Filesystem and append-only access ledgers cannot prove the absence of an unlogged manual read; ingestion remains fail-closed.

inventory_policy.cutoff_definition: Maximum actual ts_event/timestamp present per product, not the nominal request end.
inventory_policy.derived_arrays: Every NPY is declared with SHA-256 by its immutable canonical feature-bundle manifest; paths and declarations are reconciled.
inventory_policy.direct_artifacts: Every non-NPY file under data/ except this manifest is hashed.
